description: Turn customers into advocates: referral loops, case studies, reviews, testimonials

items.name: Referral program mechanics
items.tactic: Referrer + referee both benefit ($$$). Referrer gets $100 credit. Referee gets $50 off. Viral coefficient 1.5+ = exponential growth.

items.name: Case study mining
items.tactic: Best customers = case studies. Quantify: before/after metrics. Get permission + quote. Use in sales (80% higher conversion with case studies).

items.name: Review generation (authentic)
items.tactic: Ask happy customers: "Would you recommend us?" If yes → ask for review. Authentic > incentivized reviews.
